stories.title: Game Recap — Cubs 8, Brewers 2 (June 27)
stories.angle: Cubs bounce back with an 8-2 win in Game 2. Imanaga started, offense erupted. Series knotted 1-1 heading into today's decisive Game 3 at 1:10 PM CT. Mandatory lead story.

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Cubs 8, Brewers 2.

Bounce-back complete. Imanaga and the offense erupted in Milwaukee to knot the series at 1-1.

Game 3 today at 1:10 PM CT — Rolison takes the ball for the series finale at American Family Field.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Game 3 Preview — Rolison vs. Woodruff
stories.angle: Ryan Rolison (5-1, 1.82 ERA) takes the mound for the series finale. Woodruff returning from injury for the Brewers. Rolison has been the surprise arm of 2026 — carrying the makeshift rotation with five starters on the IL. 1:10 PM CT.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Ryan Rolison (5-1, 1.82 ERA) takes the ball at 1:10 PM CT — with the Brewers series on the line.

With five starters on the IL, Rolison has quietly become one of the hottest arms in the NL. Game 3. American Family Field. Series finale.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong — June for the Ages
stories.angle: PCA's June: 10 HR, .867 SLG in 20 games. Season: .287/.367/.521, 17 HR, 18 SB. The 24-year-old center fielder is CARRYING this offense while five rotation spots sit empty. All-Star case that's hard to argue with.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Pete Crow-Armstrong in June: 10 home runs. .867 slugging.

Season line: .287/.367/.521, 17 HR, 18 SB. The 24-year-old is CARRYING this offense — and doing it while five rotation spots sit empty on the IL.

All-Star caliber season. Not a debate.

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs

research.facts:

- **[MEDIUM]** 2026 season: .287/.367/.521, 17 HR, 18 SB — consistent across multiple research passes over two days. MEDIUM until crosschecked with Baseball Reference.

stories.title: Rotation Crisis — Trade Deadline in 36 Days
stories.angle: Five Cubs starters on the IL. August 3 deadline 36 days out. Rolison holding the rotation together while Jaxon Wiggins rehabs an elbow. Hoyer needs a bold move. The deadline defines this Cubs season.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Five Cubs starters on the IL. The August 3 trade deadline is 36 days away.

Rolison is carrying what's left of this rotation while the farm system's best arm rehabs his elbow. Hoyer has to make a move — and soon.

The deadline defines this season.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

research.facts:
Rotation Crisis — Trade Deadline in 36 Days
- **[HIGH]** Five starters on IL: Horton (Tommy John/UCL), Steele (elbow, 60-day), Taillon (hamstring), Brown (neck strain), Cabrera (IL) — confirmed from CBS Sports injury report and consistent across all research ✓
- **[MEDIUM]** Jaxon Wiggins: elbow inflammation, in rehab — confirmed from June 27 coverage and June 28 research. Optimistic prognosis per Counsell quote (LOW confidence on exact quote).
- **[HIGH]** Trade deadline: August 3, 2026 — standard MLB rule, consistent with prior pipeline references ✓
- **[HIGH]** Days to deadline: 36 days from June 28 to August 3 — calculated: June 28→30 = 2, July 31 days, Aug 1-3 = 3. Total = 36 ✓
- **[MEDIUM]** Ryan Rolison (5-1, 1.82 ERA) carrying rotation — confirmed from STORY 2 sources above

stories.title: Wild Card Watch — Records, Gap, Path Forward
stories.angle: Cubs 45-38, Brewers 50-30. Cubs are 6.5 games back in the NL Central — division chase isn't the story. Wild Card is the realistic path. But it requires a rotation upgrade.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Cubs 45-38. Brewers 50-30. Six and a half games back in the NL Central.

The division title's out of reach — the Wild Card is the path. But it doesn't happen without a rotation upgrade before August 3. This deadline matters.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB
